name: 1340 Shield
description: Rare Vladof absorb shield. It features an onboard voice module that announces shield conditions such as low capacity, breaking, taking elemental hits, and fully recharging. Aside from these callouts, it performs much like other blue absorb shields.
notes:
Despite being Vladof, it uses the same visual model as a blue Hyperion amplify shield.

If equipped on Deathtrap via Sharing is Caring, it can bug out like other Vladof shields and may keep playing voice lines even after the shield is gone and Deathtrap is taking health damage.

special.description: Includes a unique voice module that speaks in the voice of Loader 1340. No other special effect.
special.title: If you can't beat 'em, join 'em.

abilities: Absorbed ammo is added to your backpack.
